title: Encoded / Obfuscated PowerShell
description: Detects encoded/obfuscated PowerShell execution (4688/4104) using base64, hidden window, download cradles and bypass flags.
author: SOC Team
aql: SELECT sourceip, username, QIDNAME(qid) AS EventName FROM events WHERE UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%EventID=4688%' AND UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%powershell%' AND (UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%-enc%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%frombase64string%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%downloadstring%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%bypass%') ORDER BY starttime DESC LAST 10 MINUTES
